snippet.title: Aadu 3 Official Trailer | Jayasurya | Midhun Manuel Thomas |Vijay Babu & Venu Kunnappilly| Vinayakan
snippet.description:
Aadu -3 , In Theatres Worldwide from 19th March 2026! 

Cast : Jayasurya, Vijay Babu, Sunny Wayne, Vinyakan, Saiju Kurup, Dharmajan, Harikrishnan, Bhagath Manuel, etc.

Written and Directed by:  Midhun Manuel Thomas
Produced by : Vijay Babu & Venu Kunnappilly
Banner: Friday Film House & Kavya Film Company
Director Of Photography: Akhil George
Music & Original Themes: Shaan Rahman
Background Score & New Themes: Dawn Vincent
Film Editor: Lijo Paul
Executive Producer: Vinay Babu
Line Producer: Gopakumar Gk
Production Controller: Shibu G Suseelan
Production Designer: Anees Nadodi Pdc
Costume Designer: Stephy Zaviour
Makeup: Ronex Xavier
Sound Design: Kishan Mohan (Saptha Records)
Lyrics: Manu Manjith
Chief Associate Directors: Premnath, Robin Varghese
Creative Director: Vishnu Bharathan
Vfx Director: Jishnu Dev
Di Hues & Tones Colour Hub Colorist: Shanmugapandian M
Pro & Marketing: Vaisakh C Vadakkeveedu, Jinu Anilkumar, Hytz
Stills: Vishnu S Rajan
Publicity Designs: Aesthetic Kunjamma
Title Design: Collins Leophil
Trailer cuts : Vikas Alphonse
Final Mix : MR Rajakrishnan

snippet.description:
Watch the official #RaakaasaaTeaser now! A fantasy-comedy starring Sangeeth Shobhan & Nayan Sarika. #RńĀkńĀsńĀ In Cinemas April 3, 2026 ūüí•
‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶
Rakasa (formerly #PEP2) is a fantasy-comedy film from Pink Elephant Pictures, produced by Niharika Konidela and Zee Studios, directed by Manasa Sharma. Blending imaginative fantasy with engaging humour for audiences of all ages.

Featuring a fresh and exciting pairing of Sangeeth Shobhan and Nayan Sarika in the lead roles, Vennela Kishore, Brahmaji, Tanikella Bharani, Ashish Vidyarthi, Getup Srinu, Sukhwinder Singh, Anoop Singh, Vasu Inturi, Rohini, Rohan Roy.

snippet.title: BTS THE COMEBACK LIVE | ARIRANG | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
ARMY - ARE YOU READY?! Let the countdown begin, pop royalty is back!

BTS members RM, Jin, SUGA, j-hope, Jimin, V and Jung Kook reunite on the global stage for the first time to celebrate the release of their new album, Arirang. Catch the historic performance LIVE worldwide from Korea, only on Netflix.

BTS THE COMEBACK LIVE | ARIRANG. March 21 8PM KST / 7AM ET / 4AM PT.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/82157128

https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

snippet.description:
TOXIC (2026) ‚Äď Trailer brings together Rocking Star Yash, Akshay Kumar, and Tara Sutaria in an intense fan made AI cinematic universe packed with style, action, and high-voltage drama.

The trailer opens with Yash arriving in ultimate style in his luxurious Rolls Royce, heading straight toward a grand royal palace where Akshay Kumar rules like a mysterious kingpin. But this meeting is not easy. Akshay Kumar‚Äôs golden mask gangster army is already waiting to stop Yash before he can step inside the palace walls.

What follows is a brutal and stylish action sequence where Yash takes down waves of masked gangsters with pure mass energy and fearless attitude. Each frame is loaded with elevation shots, slow-motion fight sequences, powerful background score, and larger-than-life cinematic moments.

As the chaos settles, the final scene builds intense suspense ‚ÄĒ Yash finally comes face to face with Akshay Kumar. Two powerful personalities. One silent battlefield. Guns raised. Eyes locked. The ultimate showdown begins.

This fan made AI trailer imagines a stylish action thriller filled with luxury, danger, betrayal, and dominance. The visuals are created purely for entertainment and are not related to any official movie announcement.

id.description:

Trailer dibuka dengan Yash tiba dengan gaya mewah di Rolls Royce-nya, langsung menuju istana kerajaan megah tempat Akshay Kumar berkuasa seperti seorang raja misterius. Namun pertemuan ini tidak mudah. ‚Äč‚ÄčPasukan gangster bertopeng emas Akshay Kumar sudah menunggu untuk menghentikan Yash sebelum ia dapat memasuki tembok istana.

Yang selanjutnya adalah adegan aksi brutal dan penuh gaya di mana Yash menghabisi gelombang gangster bertopeng dengan energi luar biasa dan sikap tanpa takut. Setiap frame dipenuhi dengan pengambilan gambar dari ketinggian, adegan pertarungan slow-motion, musik latar yang kuat, dan momen sinematik yang luar biasa.

Saat kekacauan mereda, adegan terakhir membangun ketegangan yang intens ‚ÄĒ Yash akhirnya berhadapan langsung dengan Akshay Kumar. Dua kepribadian yang kuat. Satu medan perang yang sunyi. Senjata terangkat. Mata terkunci. Pertarungan pamungkas dimulai.

Trailer AI buatan penggemar ini membayangkan sebuah film thriller aksi penuh gaya yang dipenuhi kemewahan, bahaya, pengkhianatan, dan dominasi. Visualnya dibuat murni untuk hiburan dan tidak terkait dengan pengumuman film resmi apa pun.

Jika Anda menyukai trailer aksi massal, konsep AI sinematik, dan momen pertarungan yang dahsyat, dukung video ini dengan menyukai, membagikan, dan berlangganan untuk kreasi buatan penggemar yang lebih epik.

snippet.title: Holi Khele Masane Mein | Malini Awasthi | Latest Holi Songs | Holi Ke Gane | Holi 2026
snippet.description:
"Holi Khele Masane Mein" a folk Holi Song sung by the renowned folk singer Malini Awasthi. Rooted in traditional Indian folk music, this unique Holi special is dedicated to Lord Shiva. It depicts the divine and mystical Holi played by Mahadev in the cremation grounds, where colors are replaced with sacred ash and bhasm.

Unlike conventional Holi party songs, this devotional Holi bhajan reflects the spiritual and intense form of Shiva ‚ÄĒ the ascetic, the destroyer, and the eternal yogi. Through powerful vocals and authentic folk composition, this song beautifully portrays the imagery of Bhasm Holi, spiritual detachment, and divine celebration beyond worldly colors.

If you are searching for Shiv Holi song, Malini Awasthi song, devotional Holi songs, Mahadev bhajan, or Shiv bhakti song, this track is a must-add to your playlist. Perfect for Maha Shivratri, Holi celebrations, bhajan sandhya, and devotional gatherings.

Experience a different shade of Holi ‚ÄĒ one of devotion, vairagya, and divine energy.

#HoliSong #ShivHoli #MaliniAwasthi #Mahadev #BholeNath #DevotionalSongs #FolkHoli #ShivBhajan #HoliSpecial #holikhelemasanemein #holikhelemasanemeinsong #masanekiholi

snippet.title: MOOODI VS RAGA! TLC WAR with Special Guest DOLAAND TRUMP! (WWE 2K25)
snippet.description:
WWE 2K25 ke ring mein aaj tak ki sabse badi "Political War" shuru hone wali hai! Ek taraf hain Mooodi aur doosri taraf Raga. Aur twist ye hai ki is match ke Special Guest Referee aur koi nahi balki Dolaand Trump hain!
[Match Details]
Game: WWE 2K25
Match Type: TLC (Tables, Ladders & Chairs)
Characters: Mooodi vs Raga (Custom Superstars)
Special Appearance: Dolaand Trump
[Call to Action]

snippet.title: De Daru De Daru | Karma (1986) | Kishore Kumar, Manhar Udhas | Jackie Shroff, Anil Kapoor
snippet.description:
Song Details :
Star Cast : Dilip Kumar, Nutan, Naseeruddin Shah, Jackie Shroff, Anil Kapoor, Anupam Kher, Sridevi, Poonam Dhillon
Singers : Kishore Kumar, Mahendra Kapoor, Manhar Udhas
Music Director :  Laxmikant Pyarelal
Lyrics by: Anand Bakshi
Producer & Director: Subhash Ghai

Lyrics:

De Daru, De Daru, O Mere Bhaiya De Daru
Saavan ka mast mahina hain
Saavan ka mast mahina hain
Kyaa saagar hain kyaa minaa hain
Ye peena bhi koi peena hain
Peena hain peena hain
Peena hain to munh se lagaakar
Botal peene de daaru
De  dada o mere bhaiya re de daaru
De daaru botal se peene de daaru
Are bade dinon ke
Baad mili hain ye daaru
Are hosh rahe na
Baaki saaqi de daaru
O mere bhaiya de daaru

Ye andar baahar hone do
Hamen hansane do hamen rone do
Sab bhed karam khul jaa enge
Sab bhed karam khul jaa enge
Sab kante pe tul jaa enge
Ham bure sahi par achchhe hain
Kyonki ham dil ke sachche hain
Are jooth kahen to jaan hamaari
Le daaru o mere bhaiya de daaru

One peg two peg three peg four peg
Ham peg pikar hosh mein aae hain
Haan ab ham josh mein aae hain
Paani mein aag milaai hain
Kuchh garmi khuun mein aayi hain
Masti sar chadhake bolegi
Ab gori ghuunghat kholegi
Wo haath kisi ke pade nahin
Hum bade dinon se lade nahin
Are aaj kisi ko maarenge de daaru
Are detaa jaa daaru re
O mere bhaiya de daaru.

Sab bhed karam khul jaa enge
Sab bhed karam khul jaa enge
Sab kante pe tul jaa enge
Ham bure sahi par achchhe hain
Kyonki ham dil ke sachche hain
Are jooth kahen to jaan hamaari
Le daaru o mere bhaiya de daaru

One peg two peg three peg four peg
Ham peg pikar hosh mein aae hain
Haan ab ham josh mein aae hain
Paani mein aag milaai hain
Kuchh garmi khuun mein aayi hain
Masti sar chadhake bolegi
Ab gori ghuunghat kholegi
Wo haath kisi ke pade nahin
Hum bade dinon se lade nahin
Are aaj kisi ko maarenge de daaru
Are detaa jaa daaru re
O mere bhaiya de daaru.

snippet.title: Kailash Mein Bappa Ki Holi | Holi Special Song | Rudrasync | Official Music 2026
snippet.description:
Kailash Mein Bappa Ki Holi | Holi Special Song | Rudrasync | Official Music 2026

Kailash Mein Bappa Ki Holi ek anokha, divya aur aatma ko chhoo jaane wala Holi special bhajan hai ‚ÄĒ
jahaan rang sirf dharti par nahi,
balki Kailash ke shikhar par bhi baraste hain ūüŹĒÔłŹūüĆąūüźė

Yeh geet us kalpana ko jeevant karta hai
jahaan barf se dhake Kailash par
bhakti ki garmi hai,
prem ke rang hain,
aur Ganpati Bappa khud muskurate hue Holi khel rahe hain ‚ú®ūüôŹ

Jahaan Shiv ka vaas hai,
jahaan shanti ka aakash hai,
wahin jab Bappa ke saath rang ghul jaate hain ‚ÄĒ
toh Holi sirf tyohar nahi rehti,
ek divya utsav ban jaati hai ūüĒĪūüĆł

ūüíõ Essence of the Track
‚ÄúKailash Mein Bappa Ki Holi‚ÄĚ darshaata hai:
ūüŹĒÔłŹ Bhakti jo har sthaan pavitra kar de
ūüźė Bappa jo har utsav ke saathi hain
ūüĆą Rang jo shanti ke saath ghule ho
ūüôŹ Holi jo adhyatmik anubhav ban jaaye

ūüéß What You Will Feel
ūüŹĒÔłŹ Kailash ki Shanti
ūüĆą Divine Holi Energy
ūüźė Ganpati Bappa ka Anokha Roop
ūüôŹ Bhakti + Utsav ka Balance
‚ú® Inner Joy & Calm

Director : Rakesh Roshan

Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup 
Laamba Laamba Ghoonghat Kaahe Ko Daala
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup

Kya Kaheen Kar Aayi Tu Munh Kaala Re 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup
Kaanon Mein Batiyaan Karti Hain Sakhiyaan 
Raat Kiya Re Tune Kaisa Ghotala 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup

Chhat Pe Soya Tha Bahanoi
Chhat Pe Soya Tha Bahanoi

Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karna

Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karna
Galati Mhaare Se Ho Gayi

Main Tanne Samajh Kar So Gayi 
Mujhako Raana Ji Maaf Karna

Kyon Na Pahachaana Toone Piya Ji Ka Chehara 
Gup Chup Gup Chup Gup Chup

Rakhi Thi Chaadar Rakhi Thi Chaadar

Aadhe Bistar Pe Vo Soya Tha
Aadhe Pe Main So Gai

Chhitaki To Hogi Chhat Pe Chandaniya 
Apano Paraayo Nazar Na Aayo 
Bhool Kaise Ho Gai Tujhase Dulariya

Kaisa Achambha Kaisa Achambha

jatt kala kala aaonda piche thokda, (x2)
hath wadyea, vadeya, badeya shikariyan ne Jorh te,

tenu rang laun de layi,
rusi nu manaon de layi, (x2)
oh yaar aa geya aae naake saare tor ke,
aa geya ae nake sare torh k,
tenu rang laun de layi, (x2)

Holi HAI !!
HOLI Hai !!

snippet.title: Weltify Pro Clash Season 2 | Grand Finals Judgement Day | #godlike #gdr #rntx #orangutan
snippet.description:
Welcome to WELTIFY PRO CLASH SEASON 2 (WPCS2) ‚ÄĒ one of India‚Äôs biggest competitive BGMI esports tournaments.

ūüŹÜ STAGE: Grand Finals ‚Äď Day 3 
ūüďÖ DATE: 4th March 2026
‚Źį TIME: 2:45 PM onwards
ūüďć FORMAT: Online

MATCH MAP ORDER
RONDO
ERANGEL
ERANGEL
ERANGEL
MIRAMAR 
MIRAMAR 

Teams Participating - 
Hero Xtreme GodLike, iQOO Revenant X Spark, iQOO Orangutan, OnePlus Gods Reign, iQOO 8Bit, Victores Sumus, NoNx Esports, Vasista Esports, Genesis Esports, Meta Ninza, Rising Esports, 4TR Official, Vanguard Esports, Team H4K, Team LEFP, Team Alpha


Welt Esports is a competitive gaming organization dedicated to excellence, innovation, and community within the global esports scene. Founded with a passion for gaming and a commitment to growth, Welt Esports brings together top-tier talent, strategic minds, and a shared vision to dominate the digital battlefield.

Specializing in titles such as Bgmi,Clash Royale,Free Fire,Valorant and Fortnite, our teams are known for their tactical precision, relentless grind, and dynamic playstyles. We focus not only on winning, but on creating a culture where players can thrive‚ÄĒboth in and out of the game.

Welt Esports is more than just a team; it's a movement. Our organization is built on the belief that esports is a legitimate and powerful force in entertainment, capable of inspiring, connecting, and pushing boundaries. We support our players with elite coaching, mental performance resources, and cutting-edge training environments.

Whether we‚Äôre lighting up the main stage or growing our fanbase online, Welt Esports stands for passion, perseverance, and performance. As we continue to rise, we invite gamers, fans, and partners to be a part of our journey‚ÄĒto create, compete, and conquer together under one banner: Welt.

website : www.weltesports.com
Discord : https://discord.gg/Bjpk3u8Cyw

snippet.title: Rang Mere Gore Galan Pe ( Holi Rasiya ) Satveer Gujjar | Ramhans Tanwar | Mannu Pahari | Holi Song
snippet.description:
ūüĆł Rang Mere Gore Galan Pe | Official Holi Rasiya | Mannu Pahari ūüĆł  

Holi ke rang, desi masti aur gaon ki asli vibe lekar aa gaya hai ek dhamakedaar Rasiya ‚ÄĒ ‚ÄúRang Mere Gore Galan Pe‚ÄĚ ūüé∂  

Is gaane ko pure dil se shoot kiya gaya hai hamare apne Gaon Pahari ki mitti mein, jahan ke logon ka pyaar aur support is video ki sabse badi taqat raha. Isme Team Makkari ke talented artists ne apni energy aur acting se Holi ke asli rang screen par utaar diye hain.  

Ye sirf ek song nahi, balki gaon ki Holi, dosti, hasi-mazaak aur rangon ki khushi ka celebration hai ‚ÄĒ jahan har frame mein desi culture aur festive vibe mehsoos hogi.  

ūüĒ• ŗ§Öŗ§óŗ§į video pasand aaye to Like ūüĎć, Share ūüď≤ aur Channel ko Subscribe zaroor karein ‚ÄĒ Mannu Pahari ko support karte rahein.
